privileged_info_summary: The employee_performance.csv dataset contains exactly 1000 rows of employee records with 12 columns: ID, Name, Age, Gender, Department, Salary, Joining Date, Performance Score, Experience, Status, Location, and Session. A significant data quality issue exists: 498 rows (49.8% of the dataset) have blank Performance Score values. The data contains exactly three departments (HR, IT, Sales) and two status values (Active, Inactive). Performance Score values range from 1.0 to 5.0 for non-blank entries. The task requires creating a Power BI report file named HR_Workforce_Analytics.pbix on the Desktop with a page called 'Workforce Analysis' containing three visuals: a stacked bar chart, a line chart, and a slicer, along with Power Query transformations to filter null scores and add a Performance_Tier conditional column.
